name: Ritvik Prabhu
title: PhD Student in Computer Science
tagline: High-performance systems for scalable machine learning.

hero.headline: Hi, I’m Ritvik.
hero.body: I’m a PhD student in Computer Science at Virginia Tech. I work on high-performance systems for scalable machine learning, especially distributed training, optimization, and GPU-aware algorithms.
hero.body2: I’m interested in why promising machine-learning methods often fail to become practical at scale — and what systems work is needed to fix that.
